name: Rahul Sharma
rounds_detail: Online Assessment had 2 coding questions (graphs and arrays). Technical 1 was entirely DSA focusing on Trees. Technical 2 was LLD and DSA. Bar Raiser was mostly behavioral with leadership principles.
questions_asked: 1. Reverse a linked list in groups of k. 2. Design a URL shortener.
tips: Focus heavily on Amazon Leadership Principles for the final round. Practice DP and Graphs.

name: Priya Patel
rounds_detail: Aptitude was moderate. GD topic was 'AI vs Jobs'. Technical interview focused on SQL, DBMS concepts and my final year project.
questions_asked: Difference between clustered and non-clustered index. Explain normalization up to 3NF.
tips: Be confident in GD. Know your resume inside out.

name: Amit Kumar
rounds_detail: OA had 3 questions, 2 easy 1 hard. Tech rounds focused heavily on System Design for freshers which was surprising, and advanced DSA.
questions_asked: Design Tic-Tac-Toe. Find median in a stream of integers.
tips: Explain your thought process clearly before writing code.

name: Neha Gupta
rounds_detail: NQT was standard. Technical round asked basic Java questions and OOPs concepts.
questions_asked: What is polymorphism? Write a program for Fibonacci series using recursion.
tips: Clear your basics of OOPs and DBMS.

name: Vikram Singh
rounds_detail: OA cleared but failed in Tech Round 1. Was asked a hard graph question.
tips: Don't ignore graphs like I did.
